name: E-10 rule deprecation lifecycle: --update-inline-suppressions --paths rewrites inline rubric-disable comments from <old> to <new>
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'let x = 1; // rubric-disable-line old-rule -- temp\n' > src/a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/migrate-rule.sh" old-rule --to new-rule --update-inline-suppressions --paths 'src/**/*.ts' 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'new-rule' src/a.ts && ! grep -q 'old-rule' src/a.ts && echo inline_updated 1>&2
